untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires identification of broadening bottom with five alternating touches and detection of partial rise/decline moves. These require multi-bar pattern analysis and pivot point detection that cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons with allowed operators. Broadening bottom pattern structure, alternating touch identification, and partial move direction detection are not available as atomic indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a reversal pattern (broadening bottom) with context-dependent entry: long on partial decline, short on partial rise. The core logic is reversed entry (opposite to partial move direction). However, the pattern structure itself—identifying five alternating touches forming a broadening pattern—requires pattern recognition not supported by the allowed indicator set. Provided a placeholder using close direction change against previous close as a proxy, but this does not capture the true pattern. Stop loss placement (AUTHOR_SILENT) set to conservative 2%. Target price calculation uses pattern height subtracted from lowest low, also not expressible with allowed indicators.
